Facility Settings
🔐 Password Reset Security PIN

This PIN is required before anyone can reset a password. Only the Administrator should know it. Set a 4–8 digit PIN and share it only with trusted persons.

⚠️ If the PIN is lost, an Admin can clear it by entering anything in "Current PIN" and setting a new one — only if logged in as Admin.

Data Management
✅Shared database active: All data is stored in Supabase and shared across all users in real time. Any device that opens the platform link sees the same data automatically.
